title: ICF KPI 1 methodology: number of people supported to better adapt to the effects of climate change
body: "This is one of the key performance indicators (KPIs) used for reporting on our International Climate Finance (ICF) portfolio. The results against this indicator and the other KPIs can be found in the ICF results publications.  ICF KPI 1 is an output indicator that measures the reach of UK ICF climate change adaptation programmes. It counts the number of people whom ICF programmes have supported to prepare for and deal with the effects of climate change. This may include long-term changes in weather patterns and the increasing frequency and severity of extreme weather events. "

taxons.title: Climate change impact in developing countries
